scripts.db:debug: node -r dotenv/config -e "const pick=(o,...ks)=>ks.map(k=>o[k]).find(v=>typeof v==='string'&&v.trim())||''; const raw=pick(process.env,'DATABASE_URL','PRISMA_DATABASE_URL','POSTGRES_URL','POSTGRESQL_URL'); const mask=(s)=>String(s||'').replace(/:(?:[^@]*)@/,':***@'); console.log('cwd',process.cwd()); console.log('DATABASE_URL', raw ? mask(raw) : '[missing]'); try{ const u=new URL(raw); console.log('user', u.username || '[missing]'); console.log('host', u.hostname || '[missing]'); console.log('port', u.port || '[missing]'); console.log('db', (u.pathname||'').replace(/^\//,'') || '[missing]'); console.log('sslmode', u.searchParams.get('sslmode') || '[missing]'); } catch { console.log('URL parse failed'); }"
scripts.env:check: node -r dotenv/config -e "const keys=['DATABASE_URL','PRISMA_DATABASE_URL','POSTGRES_URL','POSTGRESQL_URL','PORT','NODE_ENV','MOVESCOUT_DEFAULT_ORG_KEY']; const mask=(v)=>{const s=String(v||''); if(!s) return s; if(s.startsWith('postgresql://')||s.startsWith('postgres://')||s.startsWith('mysql://')) return s.replace(/:(?:[^@]*)@/,':***@'); return s.length>6 ? s.slice(0,3)+'***'+s.slice(-2) : '***';}; console.log('cwd',process.cwd()); for (const k of keys){const v=process.env[k]; console.log(k, v?('[set] '+mask(v)):'[missing]');}"
